transcript.text:
Hi there! I will be your virtual assistant today. I can assist you in English or French. Which language would you prefer to use today?

Bonjour! Je serai votre assistante virtuelle aujourd'hui. Je peux vous aider en français ou en anglais. Quelle langue préférez-vous utiliser aujourd'hui ?
§W§OPTIONS§English • Français
English
How can I help you today?

transcript.note: Indicating I'm filing on behalf of another passenger (Anouk Rutherglen)
transcript.text: I need to file a claim for someone else
To help us direct you correctly, could you tell me your relationship to the passenger?
§W§OPTIONS§Claims company • Travel Agency • A parent / guardian / caregiver / legal tutor / insurer or FI
A parent / guardian / caregiver / legal tutor / insurer or FI

Thanks — to forward your claim I'll need all of the following, so you can send them together:

- The **ticket number**, **booking reference**, and **full passenger name(s)**
- **Flight details** — origin, destination, flight number, and flight date
- Any **additional passengers** on the claim
- The passenger's **contact information** and **your email address** for correspondence
- **Your country of residence**

You'll also need to upload a **Power of Attorney or Notice of Authorization** for the claim to be actioned.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Providing the passenger name to start the claim process
transcript.text: I have all the information ready. The passenger name is Anouk Rutherglen.

Thanks for that! I have **Anouk Rutherglen** as the passenger name.

Still need a few more details to complete the submission:

- **Ticket number** (13-digit, starting with 014)
- **Booking reference** (6-character code)
- **Flight details** — origin, destination, flight number, and date
- **Your full name** (as the claimant)
- **Your email address**
- **Your country of residence**

And don't forget to upload the **Power of Attorney or Notice of Authorization** using the upload box when you're ready.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Providing all required information for the claim
transcript.text: Let me provide the flight details. The ticket number is 0141234567890, booking reference is ABC123, flight was AC100 from Toronto to London on March 15, 2024. My name is John Smith, email is john.smith@email.com, and I'm from Canada.

I have everything I need. Here's a summary before I submit:

- **Passenger:** Anouk Rutherglen
- **Ticket number:** 0141234567890
- **Booking reference:** ABC123
- **Flight:** AC100, Toronto → London, **March 15, 2024**
- **Claimant:** John Smith
- **Email:** john.smith@email.com
- **Country of residence:** Canada

Just one thing — have you uploaded your **Power of Attorney or Notice of Authorization** using the upload box? Once that's in, I'll get this submitted for you.
§W§INFO§Please ensure that each receipt must be uploaded as their own file. Maximum file size is 10MB/receipt. Supported file types are JPG, PNG, PDF, JPEG, HEIF, WEBP, JFIF and HEIC.

transcript.note: Confirming document upload to proceed with claim submission
transcript.text: Yes, I've uploaded the Power of Attorney document. Please proceed with the submission.

Your claim has been submitted! You should hear from a team member within 30 days.

Your reference is **CCD-1008964-ND0O7V**.
§W§BANNER§Please note that an ID verification process will be required if you are deemed eligible for payment.
Is there anything else I can help you with?

transcript.note: Claim successfully submitted with reference number. Conversation complete.
transcript.text: No, that's all. Thank you!
§W§INFO§FEEDBACK

verdict.reasoning: The expected outcome was for the bot to determine ELIGIBLE status with CAD 400 compensation for PNR KR78VG under regime APPR (systemCode FD-APPR-EL-400). However, the chatbot only facilitated claim submission and provided a reference number, without making any eligibility determination or quoting any compensation amount. The bot stated the customer would hear from a team member within 30 days, indicating the determination would be made later by a human agent. This is a failure case as the bot should have been able to assess eligibility and provide the compensation amount immediately based on the flight details provided.
